title: JTRSY just got upgraded to 'AAAf' by @SPGlobalRatings.
snippet: Centrifuge (@centrifuge): JTRSY just got upgraded to 'AAAf' by @SPGlobalRatings. The tokenized Treasury fund built on Centrifuge, managed by @anemoycapital and @JHIAdvisors, now holds the highest fund credit quality rating. Its 'S1+' fund volatility rating, also the highest, was reaffirmed.
